How It Works

Relief in three simple steps

1

Measure the dose

Use the included measuring cup. Dose by weight — simple instructions on every bottle.

2

Mix into food or give directly

The liquid mixes easily into wet food or can be given directly with a syringe. Dogs love the taste.

3

See results in 2–6 hours

Kaolin and Pectin go to work immediately — firming stools and calming the gut within hours.

Active Ingredients

Why it works — no proprietary blends

Every active ingredient is disclosed at its exact dose. You know exactly what your dog is getting.

🪨
PRIMARY ACTIVE

Kaolin

A natural clay that coats and soothes the intestinal lining, absorbing toxins and binding loose stools. The same ingredient used in human Kaopectate® for decades.

🍎
PRIMARY ACTIVE

Pectin

A soluble fiber derived from apples that forms a gel in the gut, slowing intestinal motility and helping bind watery stools. Works synergistically with Kaolin.

🦠
GUT SUPPORT

Probiotic Blend

Beneficial bacteria that restore healthy gut flora — addressing the root cause of diarrhea, not just the symptoms. Supports long-term digestive health.

🌼
SOOTHING

Chamomile Extract

Reduces gut inflammation and cramping. Has been used for centuries to calm digestive upset — clinically shown to relax intestinal smooth muscle.

FAQ

Common questions

How fast does it work?

Most dogs show improvement within 2–6 hours of the first dose. For severe cases, a second dose after 6 hours is recommended.

Is it safe for puppies?

Yes — Vetrion Labs is safe for dogs of all ages and breeds. Adjust dose by weight using the included measuring guide.

What's your return policy?

30-day full money-back guarantee. If your dog doesn't improve, contact us and we'll issue a complete refund — no questions asked.

Is it made in the USA?

Yes. Every bottle is manufactured in an FDA-registered, cGMP-certified facility in the United States.

When should I call a vet instead?

If diarrhea contains blood, lasts more than 48 hours, or is accompanied by vomiting and lethargy — contact your vet immediately.

How do I give it to my dog?

Mix into wet food, use a syringe directly, or add to water. Most dogs accept it readily due to its mild flavor.
